seoTitle: How to Create Canned Responses in Freshdesk
metaDescription: Learn how to build a library of canned responses in Freshdesk so your team can answer common questions faster.
intro: Creating canned responses ahead of time means your team can reply to common questions in seconds instead of retyping the same answer. This guide covers how to build them in Freshdesk.

steps.heading: Open the canned response settings
steps.body: In the admin panel, find the section for managing canned responses.

steps.heading: Create a new response
steps.body: Start a new canned response and give it a clear, searchable title.

steps.heading: Write the response content
steps.body: Draft the reply text, keeping it flexible enough to personalize for individual customers.

steps.heading: Organize and publish
steps.body: Group the response into a relevant folder if available, then save it so agents can use it right away.

faq.question: Who can create canned responses?
faq.answer: Admins typically set up the shared library, though some plans allow individual agents to create their own.

faq.question: Can canned responses be grouped by category?
faq.answer: Yes, Freshdesk usually allows folders or categories to keep a large library organized.

faq.question: How do agents find the right canned response quickly?
faq.answer: Agents can search or browse by folder within the reply editor to find the response they need.

faq.question: Can I update a canned response after it's created?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit the content of an existing canned response at any time.
